first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's strengths in full-stack development and open-source contributions while consistently pointing out the same gaps in C++, industrial automation, and secure development lifecycle experience. The minor variations in wording are well within the expected range of run-to-run noise and are not tied to the change in job locations from various global cities to India.
